task: Build a premium unlisted Tallinn workshop foundry and ten offer routes
audience: Mindvalley U attendees in Tallinn, creators, founders, team leads, and people leaders
references: FrankX brand pack: obsidian base, disciplined cyan/amber/emerald signals, editorial typography
Premium council direction: one foundry hub, outcome router, editorial offer index, no marketplace wall
Exact-system visual: Human to Practice to System to Team
Real FrankX research, library, workshop, and agent architecture routes as proof

keep: visible operational truth and independence disclaimer
avoid: decorative 3D, orbit, node, or neural-cosmos filler
unapproved Ana claims or forced visibility
direction.signature: Leave Tallinn with one thing running, expressed through the Human to Practice to System to Team artifact map
direction.system: One data registry generates the hub, outcome recommendations, ten pages, artifact timelines, proof links, host lanes, and demand forms

asset_quality.why_premium: The primary visual is the exact workshop mechanism rendered as accessible HTML/CSS, not decorative media or an invented event photograph.

artifacts.notes: The foundry, Purpose to Practice route, participant journey, independence notice, and interest form were inspected at 1440x900 and 390x844.

checks.name: asset-tier
checks.evidence: Tier C exact system diagram is the correct medium; no unverified image is shipped.

checks.name: claims-and-affiliation
checks.evidence: Independence, venue status, Ana role choice, and clinical claim boundaries are visible.

checks.name: responsive-layout
checks.evidence: The actual Vercel hub and recommended-pilot exports were inspected at desktop and 390px mobile with zero horizontal overflow.

checks.name: reduced-motion
checks.evidence: No essential animation, GSAP, WebGL, video, or scrolling runtime is introduced.

checks.name: accessibility
checks.evidence: Semantic controls, labels, focus treatment, reduced-motion behavior, and the mobile form sequence are present in the rendered preview and release contracts.

checks.name: export-inspection
checks.evidence: Actual desktop and mobile captures were inspected for hierarchy, affiliation truth, form flow, artifact clarity, and premium restraint.

checks.name: performance
checks.evidence: The production build and Vercel deployment completed, no heavy visual runtime was added, and Vercel reported no runtime errors on the release routes.
